name: Explore
intent: Explore a registry listing — a skill, harness, or rig — and dissect what it's actually for.

input.label: the skill or tool to explore
input.hint: pick the registry listing you want to dig into

pin.name: Rokha Registry Search
pin.description: Search the Rokha Registry of published agent skills, harnesses, and rigs — Rokha runs it over her own MCP registry tools.

steps.expects: the skill/tool the user wants to explore (its name)
steps.instruction: Search the Rokha Registry for the skill/tool the user named as the input. Pull up everything about it: what it does, how it runs (live tool, cloud runtime, or instructions), and who made it.
steps.produces: the chosen listing + what it does and how it runs

steps.expects: the chosen listing + what it does
steps.instruction: Using the previous step's listing, dissect its use cases: three concrete, real-world workflows this tool enables, what other registry skills pair well with it (name them), and who it's for.
steps.produces: three use cases + best pairings + who it's for

steps.instruction: Write an explorer's brief in plain English: what it is, when to reach for it, the top use cases, the best pairings, and what to try first.
